title: "Experience Enkutatash: The Vibrant Ethiopian New Year Celebration!"
description: The Ethiopian New Year, Enkutatash, is a celebration of renewal and hope, marking the end of the rainy season and the start of spring. Based on the ancient Coptic calendar, it involves traditional clothing, singing, feasting on injera and doro wat, and a large celebration in Addis Ababa, with religious ceremonies, dancing, and gift exchanges. Unique traditions include the exchange of New Year cards and the use of the blooming Ethiopian daisy for decoration. The
